Page Examples
Product Pages

Use these Tailwind CSS product page examples to to create great looking pages for individual products with detailed descriptions, images, pricing, and customer reviews. These page examples are designed and built by the Tailwind CSS team, and include a variety of different styles and layouts.

PLUS / UI BLOCKS / ECOMMERCE / PAGE EXAMPLES / PRODUCT PAGES

Product Pages

상품 갤러리, 상세 정보, 옵션 선택, 가격, 구매 CTA, 리뷰로 구성되는 상품 상세 화면 예시입니다.

Tailwind Plus처럼 각 leaf의 첫 예제는 Preview와 Code를 함께 제공하고, 이후 예제는 Preview와 잠금 code CTA로 구분합니다. 우리 예시는 실제 화면 맥락에 맞춘 설명, tags, interaction feedback을 함께 보여줍니다.

ON THIS PAGE

5 examples
With related products
With image grid
With expandable product details
With featured details
With tabs and related products
With related products
